Azzar Habbib  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded June 26th, 2022 by Drewinette

  • This mob spawns at +872, -129, +18.75 in the observation area of Paineel overlooking the newbie grounds.
  • Class: Necromancer
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

You say, 'Hail, Azzar Habbib'

Azzar Habbib says, 'I'm not in any mood for conversation. My favorite hat was torn right from my head by a gigantic bat the other night and I am quite upset.'

You say, 'What hat?'

Azzar Habbib says, 'It is a marvelous cap sewn from the finest textiles and imbued with the divine power of our lord of fear, Cazic-Thule!'

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized | Necromancer (EQ Mob Class)
This page last modified 2022-06-26 07:28:27.

Level: 25
Expansion:
Effects Used:Engulfing Darkness
Heat Blood
Lesser Shielding
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-06-26 07:26:13
Known Loot:
Alkaline Loam
Dry Marrow
Dusty Marrow
Gold Etched Rune
Makeshift Binding Powder
Necromancer Blood
Raw Supple Hide
Silvril Ore
Sullied Silk
Sullied Spinneret Fluid
Sunshard Dust

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Increased:
  Gate Callers +10
  Crimson Hands +10
  Deepwater Knights +10
  Craftkeepers +10
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics -10
Quests:
  Azzar's Dreadful Hat
  Azzar's Dreadful Hat, Part 2

Report a correction

▲ Page top
Azzar's Skeleton
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2002 at 1:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361669840
View User Forum
7 posts
I was wondering through the Paneel Porch and somehow this guy aggroed on me. When I turned to see who was killing me, it was this skeleton named Azzar Habib's pet. It didn't take long to down my 18 Ranger (now 17. Thanks!!).

Rishidian
Ranger of Tunare
Lanys T'Vyl
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 12:10 AM Rating: Decent
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
Killing Azzar Habbib:
-10 points Heretics (Paineel)
+10 points Deepwater Knights (Erudin CLR/PAL Prexxus)
+10 points Gate Callers (Erudin MAG)
+10 points Craftkeepers (Erudin ENC)
+10 points Crimson Hands (Erudin WIZ)

He has 1350 HP. He usually drops a couple platinum, and occasionally Necromancer Blood.

Two easier Heretic NPCs you can kill for the same factions are Noclin Saah nearby and Elial Brook in Toxxulia Forest.
▲ Page top

ok you guys, I know he nukes for 150 some odd and such but really that does NOT mean hes an undercon. He is simply using a necro spell OF HIS LEVEL called shock of poison so he isnt an undercon just yer typical lv 25 necro npc

QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361700938
Scholar
45 posts
This guy is indeed level 25.

Also: Deepwater faction is improved when killing him, so those of you doing FA epic quest, he is fair game. Found him upstairs from newbie guards in Paineel.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 31 2002 at 5:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Alert, Possible Danger!
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 2:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774571334
2 posts
I have been attacked by this guy and his pet. At level 22 I could easily beat feet for the Toxx zone and get out alive with the pet beating on me and taking all his DD spells. No problem I tell myself.

BUT he did throw a spell my way that I'd never heard of or had used on me to this day...

I tried to hail the guard to get the key when Azzar jumped me. He knocked me around a bit and so I decided to head for the zone, not wanting to fight a people I was trying to be kindly towards. Well, as I was making for the zone and was about to take a hard right for the zone tunnel, the message "you lose control of your body", or something close, jumps up on my chat display. Instead of turning right down the zone hallway, I kept running straight into the wall. The wall curves around the big pit and my character kept going around the contour of the passageway! I was sliding along the wall towards the spot were (presumably? have not gotten the key yet) you use the key to get into Paineel.

What made matters worse was that I had been SoWed earlier and was careening along the wall towards the drop off. Needless to say I was VERY scared I would zoom right along the edge of the wall and plummet off the side into the pit, never to find my corpse again. I finally seemed to "catch" (INCHES from the edge) on a peice of the wall and was stuck there until the spell wore off - about 15 or 20 LONG secs in all. I let go of the keyboard in case the buffers were full of "the WRONG direction" and I commenced to swan dive (swimming 65; thanks to time spent in Halas) off the edge.

I'm not sure if I would have gone into the pit if I were just a hair more left or right in the hall as I was running. I don't want to ever find out. I dont' know how deep the pit is, too afraid to get too close to the edge. I don't want to ever find that out. My ranger guild officer's surname is Falzalot, and I really don't want to follow in his footsteps either!

All I really know is, I will always have camo on when entering Paineel zone. Until the time I am SURE my faction is up to par. Or until I can kick Azzie's butt! lol, which ever comes first.

Please be careful around this guy if you are new to the area.

Xyrauth Goldeneagle
22 Wood Elf Ranger
<Upper Hand>
The Tribunal Server
▲ Page top
Well, can he see me?
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252158128
Scholar
87 posts
If I were invised would he bve able to see me? My friend went in as a level 26 druid, camoed and this guy conned indifferent, and blue. I will see later with my 17 cleric as I run to the warrens.
▲ Page top
RE: Well, can he see me?
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 3:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778324708
20 posts
he doesn't see through camo. i have to use camo any time i'm on my way to the Warrens because he's the only thing along the way that will attack me. at level 30, he was able to drop my hp down to 40% before i made it to the Warrens zoneline. he will use Screaming Terror (a stun) on you, then DoT, Darkness and DD you.

he conned blue at lvl 30.

Edited, Fri Jul 12 16:46:41 2002

This guy is about lvl 25-27 or so. I fought him today and took him down pretty easily.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2001 at 6:20 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This guy is on Heretics faction and he is NOT a lvl 50 mob as posted here. He cons green to a 56 Druid and other posts have shown him conned way below 50 as well. I killed him to determine faction. He did NOT drop the quest sash. Hope this clears up some of the misinformation here.
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2002 at 5:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253861041
31 posts
He does not drop the sash. You must kill the BAT LORD in the Warren Caves and loot the cap. Then return the cap to Azzar and he will give you the sash. Of course, you must have some sort or favorable faction with him first. I have the cap, now just trying to get the faction.

Bager
21 Mage

PS: Invis does work to get by him. Why his pet does not attack you when running with invis I do not know.
▲ Page top
faction?
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 12:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754793859
14 posts
What faction is this guy on? I killed every dog in warrens and he stills scowls at me but the Duriel guy next to him went to glowering so I know
it's not Heretics faction. Thanks.
▲ Page top
Easy kill, does drop items
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 9:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Killed him tonight with my 44 barb shammie, was easy kill even while feared, he dropped black lace sash which is one of his quest items so he DOES drop items when killed i know this for a fact.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 26 2001 at 7:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL, what a bunch of BS, 39 erud wiz cant take? A group lvl 24 thru 27 cant take? Come on ppl. I am a 29 erud necro without most 29 spells, he was pulled out, then I proceded to slaughter his pet first. Hmmm, get rid of that little DOT. After that just tack on a darkness, run around a little, and let yer pet beat him, when he turns on pet, blast with shock of poison (160 damage), run around again, after getting hit coupla times, I used taps to get to full health. Come on ppl, he has no drops, I only got 1pp, but he and the pet were both blue... oh sorry my bad, not everyone can solo blues. Hmm, I bet we shall see another necro phase come around again. Gnite all.
Wrong level

I'm a 22 bard wood elf so a lota things dont like me in there, but i killed a lot of kobolds so for the most partr im safe, im standing there conning the guards (which where green) when this @$$ comes up and starts attacking me, first he punches me for 27, being a bard with 120 in percussion i flip on selo's and jet out of there, all thw while hes casteing some nasty spells on me, i made it out with only a few scratches.

# Jul 05 2001 at 4:33 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594573349298
Sage
71 posts
He was blue to my wiz when he was level 27. He killed me after fearing me and nuking for around 120 odd damage.

I then readied myself for him, buffed myself, ran to him, rooted his pet and duked it out with him. I made it to the zone with 30 hps left. He had a lot of hitpoints and we were nuking each for quite high damage. Damn! heh.

lvl,,,,
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 4:36 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I truly doubt this guy is 50. if he is then i dunno what's wrong with him. He attacked me while i was on my way to the warrens. His pet was blue and his poison blasts only did a max of 127 dmg. Me being a lvl 22 pally i killed his pet but then turned and conned him to find he was red. apparently he was OOM by then and started punching around the 50s. I swear i coulda took him with a healer =). He can't see-invis though.

Andercross Shortsaint
dwarf paladin <Guardians>
vallon zek
